title: Implement Job, Category1, and Category2 Reference Tables
description: Full-stack backend implementation of three simple MoneyWorks reference tables: Job (project/job costing), Category1 (primary categorization), and Category2 (secondary categorization). These are lookup tables used by other entities like Products and Transactions for categorization and job costing.
why: Enable complete data validation and lookup across the SDK by implementing the reference tables that Products, Transactions, and Accounts depend on for categorization and job costing workflows.

tasks.title: Create Job entity canonical types (enums.ts, types.ts, index.ts)
tasks.description:
Create packages/canonical/src/entities/jobs/ directory with:
- enums.ts: MoneyWorksJobStatus enum (ACTIVE/COMPLETED/HOLD)
- types.ts: MoneyWorksJob interface with Code, Description, Status, Budget fields; MoneyWorksJobCreateInput; MoneyWorksJobUpdateInput
- index.ts: Export all from enums.ts and types.ts
Reference: packages/canonical/src/entities/products/ for structure pattern

tasks.title: Create Category1 entity canonical types
tasks.description:
Create packages/canonical/src/entities/category1/ directory with:
- types.ts: MoneyWorksCategory1 interface with Code, Description fields only (simple lookup table)
- index.ts: Export all from types.ts
Category tables are simple Code+Description lookup tables - no enums needed

tasks.title: Create Category2 entity canonical types
tasks.description:
Create packages/canonical/src/entities/category2/ directory with:
- types.ts: MoneyWorksCategory2 interface with Code, Description fields only (simple lookup table)
- index.ts: Export all from types.ts
Identical structure to Category1 - simple Code+Description lookup table

tasks.title: Update canonical package main index.ts with new entity exports
tasks.description:
Update packages/canonical/src/index.ts to add:
- export * as Jobs from './entities/jobs'
- export * as Category1 from './entities/category1'
- export * as Category2 from './entities/category2'
Also update CANONICAL_VERSION.entities with new entries

tasks.title: Create JobRepository with specialized query methods
tasks.description:
Create packages/data/src/repositories/job.repository.ts with:
- Extend BaseMoneyWorksRepository<MoneyWorksJob, MoneyWorksJobCreateInput, MoneyWorksJobUpdateInput>
- tableName = 'Job', primaryKey = 'Code'
- postProcess(): Parse numeric fields (Budget, etc)
- prepare(): Format data for MW import
- findByCode(code: string): Find job by Code
- findActiveJobs(): Find jobs with Status = ACTIVE
- findByStatus(status: MoneyWorksJobStatus): Find by status
Reference: packages/data/src/repositories/product.repository.ts

tasks.title: Create Category1Repository and Category2Repository
tasks.description:
Create two simple repositories:
- packages/data/src/repositories/category1.repository.ts
- packages/data/src/repositories/category2.repository.ts
Both extend BaseMoneyWorksRepository with:
- tableName = 'Category1'/'Category2', primaryKey = 'Code'
- Simple postProcess() and prepare() (minimal fields)
- findByCode(code: string) helper method
These are very simple lookup tables with just Code and Description

tasks.title: Update data package exports (repositories/index.ts and main index.ts)
tasks.description:
Update packages/data/src/repositories/index.ts to add:
- export { JobRepository } from './job.repository'
- export { Category1Repository } from './category1.repository'
- export { Category2Repository } from './category2.repository'
- Add type re-exports for canonical types

Update packages/data/src/index.ts to add:
- Import and export new repositories
- Add to createMoneyWorksClient() and createDataLayer() repository objects

tasks.title: Create API controllers for Job, Category1, Category2
tasks.description:
Create three controller files extending BaseTableController:
- packages/api/src/controllers/job.ts: JobController
- packages/api/src/controllers/category1.ts: Category1Controller
- packages/api/src/controllers/category2.ts: Category2Controller
Each needs tableName, displayName, description, primaryKey, and repo instance
Reference: packages/api/src/controllers/product.ts

tasks.title: Register entities in TableRegistry and remove from upcoming
tasks.description:
Update packages/api/src/registry/table-registry.ts:
1. Add imports for JobController, Category1Controller, Category2Controller
2. In registerTables(): Add this.register(new JobController(this.client)), etc.
3. Remove 'Job', 'Category1', 'Category2' from the upcoming array
This makes all three tables available via GET /api/v1/tables

tasks.title: Run TypeScript typecheck and verify compilation
tasks.description:
Run 'bun run typecheck' from repository root to verify:
- All new files compile without errors
- All imports resolve correctly
- All type exports are properly connected
- No circular dependency issues
Fix any compilation errors before marking complete

acceptanceCriteria.description: Job entity has canonical types defined in packages/canonical/src/entities/jobs/ with MoneyWorksJob interface, enums (JobStatus), and relevant branded types
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: packages/canonical/src/entities/jobs/ contains enums.ts (MoneyWorksJobStatus), types.ts (MoneyWorksJob interface), index.ts (exports)

acceptanceCriteria.description: Category1 entity has canonical types defined in packages/canonical/src/entities/category1/ with MoneyWorksCategory1 interface (Code, Description fields)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: packages/canonical/src/entities/category1/ contains types.ts (MoneyWorksCategory1 interface with Code, Description), index.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: Category2 entity has canonical types defined in packages/canonical/src/entities/category2/ with MoneyWorksCategory2 interface (Code, Description fields)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: packages/canonical/src/entities/category2/ contains types.ts (MoneyWorksCategory2 interface with Code, Description), index.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: JobRepository, Category1Repository, and Category2Repository extend BaseMoneyWorksRepository with postProcess() and prepare() methods
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: All three repositories extend BaseMoneyWorksRepository and implement postProcess() and prepare() methods

acceptanceCriteria.description: JobRepository includes specialized query methods: findByCode(), findActiveJobs(), findByStatus()
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: JobRepository implements findByCode(), findActiveJobs(), findByStatus(), plus bonus findByContact() and findByCategory()

acceptanceCriteria.description: All three entities appear in GET /api/v1/tables 'available' list (removed from 'upcoming')
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: TableRegistry registers JobController, Category1Controller, Category2Controller and upcoming array is now empty

acceptanceCriteria.description: TypeScript compilation passes with zero errors (bun run typecheck)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: canonical and data packages pass typecheck (tsc --noEmit). API package has pre-existing unrelated errors but new controllers compile cleanly.

decisions.title: Added bonus query methods to JobRepository
decisions.description: Added findByContact() and findByCategory() methods beyond requirements for completeness
decisions.rationale: Jobs commonly need to be queried by contact/customer and category, so these are useful additions

learnings.description: Simple lookup tables (Category1/2) can share identical repository structure with minimal postProcess/prepare
Package exports need to be added in 4 places: package.json exports, src/index.ts exports, repositories/index.ts, and CANONICAL_VERSION
